title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 165.081 - County treasurer to pay over state and county school moneys to district treasurer monthly (seven-director districts)
text:
165.081.  County treasurer to pay over state and county school moneys to district treasurer monthly (seven-director districts). — The county treasurer shall pay over to the treasurer of each seven-director school district any state or county school moneys received by him to which the district is entitled, at least once in every month and take duplicate receipts from the treasurer one of which he shall file with the secretary of the board, and the other he shall file in his settlement with the county commission.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 6-8) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 §§ 165.343, 165.460)
